title: Duvod k rozvodu
writer: Karel Bachman, Václav Wasserman, Václav Mírovský
actors: Anny Ondra, Oldrich Nový, Adina Mandlová
plot: Composer Bertl is a heavy drunkard and generously spends his wife's money. Her lawyer tries to arrange a quick divorce for the couple and thus save the rest of her account.
